revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{See also cat|Geological period templates}} {{High use}} == Usage == Use the syntax {{Period start|period name|rounding (optional)}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous|-1}} ==References== References are provided by the template {{tl|Period start ref}}. Cambrian stages from {{cite journal | title = Census of the Indian Springs Lagerstätte, Poleta Formation (Cambrian), western Nevada, USA| journal = Palaeogeography, Palaeoclimatology, Palaeoecology| volume = 295 | issue = 1–2 | pages = 236| year = 2010| doi = 10.1016/j.palaeo.2010.05.041| author = English, Adam M. | author2 = Babcock, Loren E. }} ==Period templates== This list is incomplete. You may help by expanding it * [[Template:Next period]] * [[Template:Period color]] * [[Template:Period end]] * [[Template:Period end error]] * [[Template:Period id]] * [[Template:Period infoboxes]] * [[Template:Period span]] * [[Template:Period span/brief]] * [[Template:Period start]] * [[Template:Period start error]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Geological period templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Period start/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:Period start/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:Period start/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Period start/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Period start/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{See also cat|Geological period templates}} {{High use}} == Usage == Use the syntax {{Period start|period name|rounding (optional)}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous|-1}} ==References== Cambrian stages from {{cite journal | title = Census of the Indian Springs Lagerstätte, Poleta Formation (Cambrian), western Nevada, USA| journal = Palaeogeography, Palaeoclimatology, Palaeoecology| volume = 295 | issue = 1–2 | pages = 236| year = 2010| doi = 10.1016/j.palaeo.2010.05.041| author = English, Adam M. | author2 = Babcock, Loren E. }} ==Period templates== This list is incomplete. You may help by expanding it * [[Template:Next period]] * [[Template:Period color]] * [[Template:Period end]] * [[Template:Period end error]] * [[Template:Period id]] * [[Template:Period span]] * [[Template:Period span/brief]] * [[Template:Period start]] * [[Template:Period start error]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Geological period templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{See also cat|Geological period templates}} {{High use}} == Usage == Use the syntax {{Period start|period name|rounding (optional)}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous|-1}} ==References== Cambrian stages from {{cite journal | title = Census of the Indian Springs Lagerstätte, Poleta Formation (Cambrian), western Nevada, USA| journal = Palaeogeography, Palaeoclimatology, Palaeoecology| volume = 295 | issue = 1–2 | pages = 236| year = 2010| doi = 10.1016/j.palaeo.2010.05.041| author = English, Adam M. | author2 = Babcock, Loren E. }} ==Period templates== This list is incomplete. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{See also cat|Geological period templates}} {{High use}} == Usage == Use the syntax {{Period start|period name|rounding (optional)}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}

{{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous|-1}} ==References== Cambrian stages from {{cite journal | title = Census of the Indian Springs Lagerstätte, Poleta Formation (Cambrian), western Nevada, USA| journal = Palaeogeography, Palaeoclimatology, Palaeoecology| volume = 295 | issue = 1–2 | pages = 236| year = 2010| doi = 10.1016/j.palaeo.2010.05.041| author = English, Adam M. | author2 = Babcock, Loren E. }} ==Period templates== This list is incomplete. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{See also cat|Geological period templates}} {{High use}} == Usage == Use the syntax {{Period start|period name|rounding (optional)}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous|-1}} ==References== Cambrian stages from {{cite journal | title = Census of the Indian Springs Lagerstätte, Poleta Formation (Cambrian), western Nevada, USA| journal = Palaeogeography, Palaeoclimatology, Palaeoecology| volume = 295 | issue = 1–2 | pages = 236| year = 2010| doi = 10.1016/j.palaeo.2010.05.041| author = English, Adam M. | author2 = Babcock, Loren E. }} ==Period templates== This list is incomplete. {{Period start|Cretaceous}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous}} 
{{Period start|Cretaceous|-1}}
produces: {{period start|Cretaceous|-1}} ==References== Cambrian stages from {{cite journal | title = Census of the Indian Springs Lagerstätte, Poleta Formation (Cambrian), western Nevada, USA| journal = Palaeogeography, Palaeoclimatology, Palaeoecology| volume = 295 | issue = 1–2 | pages = 236| year = 2010| doi = 10.1016/j.palaeo.2010.05.041| author = English, Adam M. | author2 = Babcock, Loren E. }} ==Period templates== This list is incomplete.
